text: Lateral working incision at fourth intercostal space.
Opening the parietal pleura and dissection of the esophagus.
Holding suture to help leiomyoma mobilization during dissection.
Complete leiomyoma excision, the esophageal mucosa is intact.
Closing the esophageal muscle with interrupted sutures.
Reinforcement of the suture line with pleural flap
Replacement of a chest drain Long reinflation
